titleStmt.title: SII 4.270: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 270. (A.R. No. 41 of 1889). ON THE GATE OPPOSITE THE KUDUREKALLU-BOULDER ON THE KAMALAPUR-HAMPI ROAD.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ŇõrńęgaŠĻáńĀdhipatayńď namaŠł• . ŇõrńęmallikńĀrjunanńď gati . namastuŠĻĀgaŇõiraŇõcuŠĻĀbicaŠĻĀdracńĀmaracńĀravńď . trailŇćkyanagarńĀraŠĻĀbha
mŇęlastaŠĻĀbhńĀya ŇõaŠĻĀbhavńď . Iha kila jagati nikhilakavikulńĀbhinaŠĻĀdyamńĀnaudńĀryyadhairyyaŇõauryyńĀdijanitayaŇõaŠł•
pŇęrakarpŇęrapŇęritabrahmńĀŠĻĀŠłćakaraŠĻĀŠłćńďna samaracaŠĻĀŠłćńďna kŠĻõtabhŇęsuratrńĀŠĻáńďna jitasuratrńĀŠĻáńďna gajapatigajakŇęŠĻ≠apńĀkalńďna vidi
tanńĀnńĀkalńďna vadanavijitńĀŠĻĀbhŇćjńďna bhŇćjńďnńĀbhinavńďna (.) kńĀvyanńĀŠĻ≠akńĀlaŠĻĀkńĀramarmaj√Īńďna dharmaj√Īńďna prativarŠĻ£a
pravartyamńĀnakanakavasaŠĻĀtamahŇćtsavńďna savńďna kŠĻõtńĀrtthitaviprasńĀrtthńďna sńĀrtthńďna rńĀjńĀdhirńĀjarńĀjaparamńďŇõvarńĀdibirudńďna
caritńďna smńĀritanŠĻõganaŠł∑anahuŠĻ£anńĀbhńĀgaduŠĻĀdhumńĀramńĀŠĻĀdhńĀtŠĻõbharatabhagńęrathadeŇõaratharńĀmńĀdicaritńďna nikhilanŠĻõpa
tisńĀrvabhaumńďna bhaumńďna mńďnakńĀduhitŠĻõnaŠĻĀdanńďnŇćpńĀŠĻĀbikńĀnarasanŠĻõpanaŠĻĀdanńďna sakalahŠĻõdayńĀnaŠĻĀdanńď
na (.) naŠĻĀdananaganiŠĻĀdanńďna vadńĀ(ŠĻĀ)nyamŇęrdha(ŠĻĀ)nyńďna (.) samaramukhavńęrabhadrńďŠĻáa bhadrńďŠĻáńĀdhigatavijaya
nagaramńĀruhyasiŠĻĀhńĀsanamavanimakhilńĀmapi ŇõńĀsatńĀ nŠĻõpatinayńĀdacyutńďna manasi nihitńĀcyu
tńďnńĀccyutńďŠĻĀdramahńĀrńĀyńďŠĻáa prakŠĻüuticaŠĻĀcalńĀ lakŠĻ£mńęriti vicńĀrya nijanagaralakŠĻ£mńę
tsuŠĻáńďva niravalaŠĻĀbamaŠĻĀbaramńĀŇõritya viharatńĀmamŠĻõtńĀŇõanńĀnńĀŠĻĀ ŇõramńĀpa
niŇõitanistriŠĻĀŇõanirbhiŠĻĀŠĻáaripuvaraŠĻáasńĀdarasurayuvatijanńĀvarŇćhaŠĻáńďna pńĀnaŇõaŠĻĀ
yan pŇęrayan manasi purajanńĀnńĀmamaŠĻĀdamńĀnaŠĻĀdamanupamaŠĻĀ (.) viŇõvńĀsa
mŇęrttamiva vinayaŠĻĀ sńĀkńĀramiva tńďjŇćrńĀsiŠĻĀ sadńĀ savidhavartinaŠĻĀ (.) malla
khilaguŠĻáasńęmńĀnamadhikadhńĀmńĀnamadhipamakhilavarŠĻ£a madhikŠĻõtamńĀ
ŇõrńęvirŇępńĀkŠĻ£adńďvasadanńĀya nibhŠĻõtńĀŠĻĀ The continuation of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 4.270 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
